html:
Exclusive to:

The Pinchin' Winch is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. The Pinchin' Winch Blueprint can be bought in the Bottle Exchange Filter for an Empty Bottle. It requires 2 Boards, 1 Cut Stone and 2 Ropes to craft.

It can be placed on a Boat and is used to recover Ocean Debris, Knobbly Tree Nuts or Underwater Salvageables.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Swashbuckler Collection
Pilferin' Winch
Pilfer the sea for loot.

Trivia

  • The Pinchin' Winch was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
  • The Pinchin' Winch can be built on land. If it is activated on land, it clinks against the ground. It has the same behaviour on docks.

"winch"
“It'll do in a pinch.”
–Wilson
“It's only good for grabbing junk from the bottom of the ocean.”
–Willow
“Is mighty wooden arm for grabbing!”
–Wolfgang
“I doubt I'll find anything of interest.”
–Wendy
“BROTHER, WHAT ARE YOU DOING ON THIS ACCURSED WATER”
–WX-78
“Mankind has used winches for many hundreds of years.”
–Wickerbottom
“Let's see what we can find, eh?”
–Woodie
“We are to start dredging up what lies beneath now, are we?”
–Maxwell
“The öcean is mine tö pillage.”
–Wigfrid
“We're going hunting for treasure!”
–Webber
“It reminds me a bit of my days on the trawler.”
–Warly
“Thing lifter”
–Wormwood
“Now that's a handy bit of machinery!”
–Winona
“Hoohoo! The mortals invented a snatching machine!”
–Wortox
“Treasure grabber!”
–Wurt
“This is how we'll catch a sea monster!”
–Walter
“Thankfully, it saves me from having to dive down myself.”
–Wanda
The Pinchin' Winch is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. The Pinchin' Winch Blueprint can be bought in the Bottle Exchange Filter for an Empty Bottle. It requires 2 Boards, 1 Cut Stone and 2 Ropes to craft.
It can be placed on a Boat and is used to recover Ocean Debris, Knobbly Tree Nuts or Underwater Salvageables.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Pinchin' Winch was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
The Pinchin' Winch can be built on land. If it is activated on land, it clinks against the ground. It has the same behaviour on docks.

The mortals invented a snatching machine! |wormwood = Thing lifter |wurt = Treasure grabber! |walter = This is how we'll catch a sea monster! |wanda = Thankfully, it saves me from having to dive down myself. |choose = wortox}} The '''Pinchin' Winch''' is a craftable [[Structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. The Pinchin' Winch [[Blueprint]] can be bought in the [[Bottle Exchange Filter]] for an [[Empty Bottle#Don't Starve Together|Empty Bottle]]. It requires 2 [[Boards]], 1 [[Cut Stone]] and 2 [[Rope]]s to craft. It can be placed on a [[Boat Kit|Boat]] and is used to recover [[Ocean Debris]], [[Knobbly_Tree#Knobbly_Tree_Nut|Knobbly Tree Nut]]s or [[Underwater Salvageable]]s. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Seafaring Skins|Belongings}}
